ai_templates.prompt_template: Write one short in-world event log line for completing the quest '{quest_name}'. Keep it under 16 words.
Write one short in-world travel narration line for arriving at {new_location_name} from {old_location_name}. Keep it under 16 words.
Write one short in-world line for the start of day {day} in {location_name}. Keep it under 16 words.
Write one concise mission-briefing sentence for the task '{display_name}' at {location_name}. Employer: {faction_name}. Reward: {reward_summary}. Keep it under 20 words.
